query: SELECT ds.company_name, ds.triage_score, ds.status, dsc.verdict, dsc.confidence_score, dsc.created_at FROM deal_sources ds JOIN deal_screenings dsc ON ds.full_eval_id = dsc.id WHERE ds.status = 'screened' ORDER BY ds.triage_score DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2dg2iR9orw75o4J.0aefcec34322 --database 7EnctkaNppkKLbjFfnH6YY --execute SELECT ds.company_name, ds.triage_score, ds.status, dsc.verdict, dsc.confidence_score, dsc.created_at FROM deal_sources ds JOIN deal_screenings dsc ON ds.full_eval_id = dsc.id WHERE ds.status = 'screened' ORDER BY ds.triage_score DESC;
